title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Cafe Coffee Day

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Cafe Coffee Day
jsonLd.description:
Cafe Coffee Day is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cafe Coffee Day:
Cafe Coffee Day is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
